purpose: Constrain random combinations so traits never overlap in a way that looks broken (a hat crushing ear flowers, a neck accessory floating over a turtleneck, etc.).

categoryLabels.comment: Display names; internal keys kept stable. 'necklace' displays as 'Neck Accessories'.

traitTags.comment: Tags let compatibility rules target groups of traits instead of listing every pair.

rules.reason: A snug beanie pulled over the head would cover an ear flower or bell.
A scarf/sweater/poncho wrapped around the neck would hide a neck accessory or collar.
Festival Ribbon already occupies the chest with its sash/medallion; a neck accessory on top crowds the same zone and reads cluttered.
Only one pair of eyewear over the visible eye.

encouraged.reason: Flower crown + clover pendant reads as an intentional cottagecore nature set. Allowed and thematically encouraged, not required.

hardExclusions.comment: Explicit blocked pairs beyond the tag rules above. Format: 'category:id'.

gameplayClasses.comment: Gameplay Classes belong ONLY to the Special 21 (Founder #001 + 20 Legendary). Public/Common alpacas have NO gameplay class. Each class is bound 1:1 to a special background.

specialBackgroundClassLock.comment: Special backgrounds are LOCKED to their matching Gameplay Class. Enforced at generation/validation time for the Special 21; public NFTs are already excluded because these backgrounds are not in the random pool.
notAllowed: Common/Public alpaca (no gameplayClass) → any special background
A Special alpaca whose gameplayClass does not match the background (e.g. Guardian class → King background)

rules_special.require: token.hansome.gameplayClass === specialBackgroundClassLock.allowed inverse (background must equal the class's locked background)
rules_special.reason: King Class → King Background, Guardian → Guardian, Farmer → Farmer, Lucky → Lucky, Runner → Runner. Any other pairing is invalid.

rules_special.forbidWhen: token has no gameplayClass (i.e. Public/Common alpaca)
rules_special.reason: Only the Special 21 carry a gameplay class; a Common alpaca may never use a special background.

reservedExclusions.comment: Legendary and Reserved NFTs (the Reserved allocation includes Founder #001) are hand-authored one-of-one art and are NOT validated against these rules. The mascot is not a token and is excluded entirely.
